pattern: Tracking the current run length of a rising streak and a falling streak as you scan lets the longest monotone window emerge from two simple counters.
hints: A monotone run can only be extended by comparing each element to the one immediately before it.
Maintain two separate streak counters, one for strictly increasing and one for strictly decreasing, resetting whichever breaks.
The answer is the largest value either counter ever reaches, and it is never below one.

edge_inputs.description: all equal values yield length one
mixed with a plateau breaking the run
increasing then decreasing, neither dominates fully

stress.description: small alphabet of values to force many ties and short runs
stress.note: tight value range creates frequent breaks

stress.description: wider values to allow longer monotone stretches
